hero.downloadPitch.title: The app is the product
hero.downloadPitch.body: If you want the full Fondeka experience, the fastest next step is to install the app now.
download.proof.instant: Install now, open your account in minutes
download.proof.mobile: Best experience is inside the mobile app

download.desktop.body: Use the app for cards, bills, airtime, crypto, payments and more.
download.sticky.title: Download Fondeka before you leave
download.section.title: Put Fondeka in their pocket, not just their browser
download.section.body: Cards, bills, crypto, airtime, loans and payments convert better when the next step is install, not more scrolling.
hero.title: The mobile bank that offers you 0% interest loans.
hero.body: We offer loans, MasterCard, crypto, payment links, tontines (Likelemba & Avec), bill payments (electricity, Wi-Fi, TV), and much more.
section.businessBody: Add payments in a few lines of code. Collect via Mobile Money, cards and crypto; pay suppliers in one tap.
section.coverageBody: We start in DRC and expand quickly.
feature.cards.title: Virtual cards
feature.cards.body: Create VISA virtual cards for online purchases and subscriptions. 3‑D Secure, limits, freeze/unfreeze.
feature.paylinks.title: Link & QR payments
feature.paylinks.body: Simple invoicing, crowdfunding, remote payments: send a link and get paid via Mobile Money, card or crypto.
feature.esim.title: eSIM
feature.esim.body: Buy and activate an eSIM in seconds to stay connected while traveling.
feature.bills.title: Bill payments
feature.bills.body: Pay water, electricity, TV, internet and more—right from your Fondeka wallet.
feature.giftcards.title: Gift cards
feature.giftcards.body: Buy international gift cards or sell yours and get credited in Mobile Money or crypto.
feature.airtime.title: Airtime top-up
feature.airtime.body: Top up your numbers and send credit internationally.
feature.shopping.title: Shopping
feature.shopping.body: Use our app to do your online shopping.
feature.savings.title: Savings
feature.savings.body: Set money aside in dedicated savings pockets directly from your wallet.
feature.collect.title: Collect from many methods
feature.collect.body: Accept Mobile Money, bank cards, bank transfers and crypto—on a single link.
feature.payout.title: Payouts to many methods
feature.payout.body: Send funds to Mobile Money, cards, banks or crypto wallets at scale.
feature.crypto.title: Crypto
feature.crypto.body: Buy, sell and hold crypto. On-/off-ramp to Mobile Money and banks.

product.loans.title: Loans
product.loans.body: Finance your needs with flexible schedules. Repay via Mobile Money and other methods.
product.cards.title: Virtual cards
product.cards.body: Create and manage VISA virtual cards. Limits, 3‑D Secure, freeze/unfreeze.
product.payments.title: Payments (QR/Link, Invoice, Crowdfunding)
product.payments.body: Create payment links & QR codes for getting paid, invoicing, and running crowdfunds via Mobile Money, cards & crypto.
product.esim.title: eSIM
product.esim.body: Buy, activate, and manage eSIMs instantly.
product.bills.title: Bill payments
product.bills.body: Pay your bills (water, electricity, internet, TV…) directly from Fondeka.
product.giftcards.title: Gift cards
product.giftcards.body: Buy/sell gift cards. Get credited in Mobile Money or crypto.
product.airtime.title: Airtime top-up
product.airtime.body: Top up for you or family in multiple countries.
product.shopping.title: Shopping
product.shopping.body: Pay online easily with your Fondeka card.
product.savings.title: Savings
product.savings.body: Build your savings with flexible goals and track progress in-app.
product.savings.summary: Fondeka Savings Community digitizes tontines and likelemba so groups can save, rotate payouts, and support each other with full transparency.
product.savings.group.title: What your group can do
product.savings.group.i1: Create a group, invite members by phone number or QR code, and set clear rules.
product.savings.group.i2: Choose fixed or flexible contributions with weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cycles.
product.savings.group.i3: Track every contribution in real time and see who is on time or late.
product.savings.group.i4: Automate rotating payouts and send funds instantly to Fondeka wallets or Mobile Money.
product.savings.rollout.title: Progressive rollout
product.savings.rollout.i1: Phase 1: launch with Mobile Money first to maximize trust, compliance, and adoption.
product.savings.rollout.i2: Phase 2: optional stablecoin savings (USDT/USDC) for groups that want inflation protection.
product.savings.why.title: Why this matters in DRC
product.savings.why.i1: Built on existing community saving habits, not a foreign behavior.
product.savings.why.i2: Reduces fraud and loss risks with full transaction traceability.
product.savings.why.i3: Creates stronger member retention through network effects inside each group.
product.savings.chat.title: Community-first experience
product.savings.chat.body: Inspired by leading community-finance apps, the group space becomes the center for updates, reminders, and payments between members.
product.savings.trust.title: Transparency and discipline
product.savings.trust.body: Each member sees balances, payment history, upcoming beneficiaries, and monthly reports without manual paper tracking.
product.savings.crypto.title: Crypto as an option, not a requirement
product.savings.crypto.body: The default experience stays familiar with CDF and Mobile Money. Crypto is introduced gradually for advanced users only.
product.savings.note: Fondeka remains the custodian of funds and keeps a compliance-first rollout.
product.savings.cta: Open an account and start saving

product.crypto.title: Crypto
product.crypto.body: Buy, sell, and hold crypto. Liquid on-/off-ramps to Mobile Money and banks.
product.business.title: Fondeka Business API
product.business.body: Integrate multi-method collection & payouts (Mobile Money, cards, crypto) into your apps.
